Also , why are these sentences so long ?   Sheesh . I keep adding on so it will accept my 200 characters . \n

I am feeling like it is super duper cold out and that probably means that I won’t have a lot of customers at the bar tonight .   But I hope I am wrong because I desperately need that cash . And I am going to keep my fingers crossed .

I am feeling pretty ok because all of my customers were very kind to me when tipping me .   That made me feel better .   I made everyone laugh which made me smile .   But it’s still difficult to think about money .

I am currently feeling tired .   I went to bed and slept well until my dog , PERSON , decided it was playtime at five in the morning .   That was fun . Little bugger .   Haha .   I mean , he always gets his way . That’s how it’s supposed to be .

I am in a humongous fight with my fiancé .   He is incarcerated and has not called .   It is super stressful to have limits on times of important conversations .   It definitely has added so many layers of stress and frustration .   I love him .   But he can be a very evil human with his words .   I can too .   But not this time .

I am feeling very defeated .   Today work was busy for the servers but slow for me .   I ended up leaving in the middle of the snow storm .    I got home just fine , but I am just feeling very awful .    Nothing seems to be going right .

I am feeling tired and cold .   Today is a blizzard and I was supposed to work a double .   So that means no money for me .   This is the fifth Saturday in a row something has happened to make it so that I was unable to work .   Sucks .

Well it is still snowing so I am feeling a little bit homebound .   My neighbor came over on his four wheeler and plowed me out and I helped shoveling but the snow is over my knees so it was a bit taxing .   I feel accomplished though .   And now my dad doesn’t have to worry .

I am feeling exhausted .   I have been shoveling and making things with my neighbor for the majority of the day .   I am currently watching a new show and I think I may become obsessed .   So that’s fun .   A purpose is always fun .

I am feeling like I really need to get some things accomplished today .   I should have used yesterday , while being snowed in , as an excuse to do stuff .   But I did not .   So today I need to get my ass in gear .

I am currently feeling extremely frustrated .   I am being accused of things that are not true , and then having to argue my way out of them being fact .   It is the weirdest situation .   I am literally arguing a version of me that is not actually real .    My fiancé thinks I am a heathen .   And that is just not ever going to be the truth .

I am feeling frustrated because my fiancé is still calling me out of my name .   It is impossible to defend oneself over nonsense that someone else is portraying as fact .   He’s an asshole .   And I feel like punching him in the probates .   But he’s in jail .   So I can’t .

I am feeling a little tired .   I could not sleep last night at all .   I think I finally fell asleep around 6 in the morning and got up at 8 : 30 .   Not all that ideal .   Today I am going to consign some clothes and hit the bank .

I am feeling extremely defeated .    I drive almost an hour away to sell my brand new clothing , hoping to make maybe like $50 .    They took one hoodie , a pair of sweats and a jacket and gave me seven dollars and sixty three cents .   That’s not even enough to cover the gas it took one way !   Ugh .   I am so broke .

I am currently feeling defeated .   Like , not one thing can ever go my way .   I think that’s why I just am so defeatist - because - when I try my best - I am always always always disappointed .   I am such a positive human to the rest of the world - I wish that they could see how badly I truly struggle daily .

Quite " is an intensifier that means "really ," "completely ," "rather ," "exceptionally ," or "actually ". It ' s used to add strength to an adjective or adverb , but not as much as "really " or "very ". For example , "Blue jays are quite common in this area " means that blue jays are noticeably common , more common than you might expect . \n

Feeling calm is a mental state of peace and quiet , free from agitation , excitement , or disturbance . It can also be described as a state of serenity , tranquility , or peace .
